name: Double Dare Trigger Happy
description: Double Dare Trigger Happy is the SuperCharger counterpart of Trigger Happy in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Gold Rusher.
biography: As a result of being transformed by a Rift Engine, Trigger Happy's abilities changed drastically, though he is still able to shoot coins rapidly out of his flaming pistols. He can summon a barrier of pyrotechnics to do group damage with his secondary ability, Crowd-Pleaser. When upgraded further, his tertiary ability, Breaking Cannon, Trigger Happy can shoot himself out of an actual cannon and damage enemies on impact. After purchasing his Soul Gem, He's Safe!, the gremlin gunslinger will be able to revive himself after being defeated.
personality: Double Dare Trigger Happy greatly resembles a stereotypical daredevil, often seen shooting himself out of a cannon with little regard for his safety. Despite his normal counterpart being capable of speech in various media, Double Dare Trigger Happy is known to not talk very much.

story.content: As a result of being transformed by a Rift Engine, Trigger Happy's abilities changed drastically, though he is still able to shoot coins rapidly out of his flaming pistols. He can summon a barrier of pyrotechnics to do group damage with his secondary ability, Crowd-Pleaser.

content: I'm gonna win, I'm gonna win! Hahaha!
Hahaha! Yeah! Snakes! Train, train, train!

trivia: Despite his normal counterpart being capable of speech in Skylanders: Imaginators, the Skylanders comics, books and other media, Double Dare Trigger Happy doesn't talk very much.
He greatly resembles a stereotypical daredevil, especially since he can shoot himself out of a cannon.
Double Dare Trigger Happy is the second Skylander that can revive after being defeated, the first being Night Shift and the third being Crash Bandicoot.
One of his quotes is a reference to the movie Snakes on a Plane.
Concept art includes sketches of Double Dare Trigger Happy with a hat, sunglasses, a gun adorned with a flag, or spacesuit-like armor.
Very few characters have less regard for their safety than Trigger Happy. So, of course, he's a daredevil!

trailers.name: OFFICIAL Skylanders SuperChargers Action Clips Double Dare Trigger Happy
Skylanders SuperChargers - Double Dare Trigger Happy's Soul Gem Preview (No Gold, No Glory)
Meet the Skylanders SuperChargers Double Dare Trigger Happy and Gold Rusher

gameplay: In Skylanders: SuperChargers Racing, Double Dare Trigger Happy is classified as an all-rounder driver. However, his stats are erratic and make it hard to use him effectively. His Top Speed and Handling are both pretty good, and his Acceleration is great; these stats combined resemble classic Intermediate class kart drivers. His Firepower is also high, with his major downside being his below OK Armour. As a SuperCharger, he has access to the vehicle mods. When paired with his Gold Rusher, he receives major stat boosts to his race-specific stats and only minor boosts to his battle stats.

basic.name: Fire Cracker
basic.content: Press Attack 1 rapidly to shoot your Fire Cracker.

basic.name: Crowd-Pleaser
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to shoot off pyrotechnics and damage enemies around you.

basic_upgrades.name: Breaking Cannon
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to shoot yourself out of a Cannon! Enemies in the way will be damaged by the force of the impact.

basic_upgrades.name: Hoop N' Holler
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge up and shoot out of a fire hoop. Jumping or shooting yourself through it causes it to explode.

basic_upgrades.name: Just Warming Up
basic_upgrades.content: Ignite your weapons, making them cause more damage to enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Can On and On
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to shoot yourself out of a Cannon over a greater distance! Enemies in the way will be damaged by the force of impact.

soulgems.name: He's Safe!
soulgems.content: Once, revive after being defeated and jump out of a huge safe!

abilities.name: Hot Feet Hoop
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge up and shoot out a fire hoop. Jumping or shooting yourself through it causes it to explode and will cause you to gain increased movement.

abilities.name: Acrobatic
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 while jumping to charge up your fire ring and jump through it.

abilities.name: Fire And Forget
abilities.content: When you charge up your cannon, you'll shoot out a fire ring in front of you to burst through immediately.

abilities.name: Cannon Crash
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 while charging your cannon to shoot up into the air and do a large amount of to nearby enemies when landing.

abilities.name: Pay Day!
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to damage enemies around you and pull in coins and food drops.

abilities.name: Making It Rain!
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 while jumping to unleash a gun barrage on your enemies below!
